description: Create a User Group named 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' with the description 'Queue for complex billing and refund escalations.' and add the 'Administrator' user to this group. Create a HelpDesk ticket titled 'Disputed Charge on Invoice #8472' with Status 'Open', Priority 'High', and Description 'Customer is disputing a duplicate charge from last month's subscription renewal. Needs tier 2 review.' Assign the ticket to the 'Tier 2 Billing Escalations' group.
